name: Initial Release
notes: Baseline implementation. All existing features belong to this version unless otherwise specified.

name: Student Support
notes: Add student ID support with separate admin interface, editable names, and student authentication. Students use same email domain (@jpgacademy.org) and July 1 expiration as employees.

name: Department Data, Bulk Print & Signature Management
notes: Three capabilities: (1) Pull and display department field from FACTS SIS separately from job title, (2) Unified bulk ID card printing with criteria-based selection for both employees and students, (3) Gmail signature template system with preview and push via domain-wide delegation.
